gazette: Official Gazette dated April 5, 2024, and numbered 32511
title: Regulation Amending the Technical Criteria to be Applied in the Petroleum Market
bodyHtml:
An amendment has been made to the Regulation on the Technical Criteria to be Applied in the Petroleum Market by adding the definition of "Sustainable Maritime Blending Component (SMBC)" (a product produced from non-fossil sources, which can be blended with marine fuels and has an internationally recognized sustainability certificate).

In cases where biodiesel is used in the preparation of marine fuels, the blending ratio and the presence of biodiesel in the final product shall be clearly specified in the analysis report or documents delivered to the user. Marine fuels containing biodiesel cannot be delivered to marine vessels without the explicit consent of the user.

The blending process of marine fuels may be carried out by the holders of customs clearance licenses within the customs area, limited to a maximum blending ratio of 30% (m/m) of the quantity of the product to be blended, and subject to the preparation of marine fuels falling within the scope of the transit regime.

In case of blending with marine fuels, information regarding the blending ratio and the presence of SMBC in the final product shall be clearly stated in the analysis report or documents delivered to the user. Marine fuels containing SMBC cannot be delivered to marine vessels without the explicit consent of the user.
